type: verify implementation + verify tests + verify security boundaries
title: Independently verify Rust core, providers, postprocessors, timeout, cancellation, and pi safety

do_not_read: other directories in ~/dev unless explicitly referenced

scope: Independent verification only. Focus on behavior, security boundaries, cancellation, and test adequacy.
goals: Inspect fake-pi tests and confirm command arguments disable tools/session/context files.
Verify provider outputs cannot bypass postprocessing.
Verify timeout/cancellation behavior is tested through public APIs.
Check for accidental arbitrary shell/file access outside intended pi subprocess execution.
non_goals: Do not run real pi unless needed for a tiny command-inspection check.
success_criteria: If verification fails, include concrete issues and revive MVP-020 or spawn a fix task.
If verification passes, mark core/provider/postprocessing artifacts as trusted in the handoff.
